span.p: Model built — get it to prod and keep it fresh

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
More than one stage
dev / test / prod?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Deployment Pipelines (Premium/PPU/Fabric)
promote across stages, parameterize sources per stage

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Publish to the workspace directly
still version the .pbip in source control

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
No scheduled refresh — reads OneLake directly
manage framing / reframing, not a schedule

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
No import refresh — tune source + query folding
gateway still needed if source is on-prem

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Clustered STANDARD gateway, >=2 members
service principal / service account creds
size host for heaviest mashup

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
No gateway — cloud-to-cloud refresh
service principal creds still

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Incremental refresh
RangeStart/RangeEnd, partition by date
+ alert on refresh failure

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Scheduled full refresh
stagger datasets under the capacity limit
+ alert on refresh failure
